title: Login and access dashboard
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and is routed to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Complete multi-step signup and reach dashboard
description: Verifies a guest can complete the multi-step signup flow and is routed to the authenticated dashboard afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the signup flow
Fill in the email field with a new unique email value
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the name field with Test User
Select a user type
Select a location
Submit the signup form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Initiate a credit trade from a marketplace listing and see it in Trades
description: Verifies an authenticated member can initiate a credit trade from a listing and the trade appears in the trades list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open create listing
Fill a unique title into the listing title field
Fill a description into the listing description field
Select a valid listing type
Select a valid experience level
Fill a valid credit price into the price field
Submit the listing form
Click the navigation item to open the marketplace
Use marketplace search to search for the unique listing title
Open the listing details from the results
Choose the credit trade option
Confirm the trade terms
Click the navigation item to open trades
Verify the newly initiated trade is displayed in the trades list

title: Send a message in an existing conversation and see it appear
description: Verifies an authenticated member can select a conversation, send a message, and see the sent message appear in the chat thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open messages
Select an existing conversation from the conversation list
Fill a unique message into the message composer field
Send the message
Verify the newly sent message is displayed in the chat thread

title: Complete a credit trade and see status become completed
description: Verifies a member can mark an initiated credit trade as completed and the trade status updates to completed in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open create listing
Fill a unique title into the listing title field
Fill a description into the listing description field
Select a valid listing type
Select a valid experience level
Fill a valid credit price into the price field
Submit the listing form
Click the navigation item to open the marketplace
Use marketplace search to search for the unique listing title
Open the listing details from the results
Choose the credit trade option
Confirm the trade terms
Click the navigation item to open trades
Open the newly created trade details
Mark the trade as completed
Verify the trade status is displayed as completed

title: Submit a review for a completed trade and see it on the counterparty profile
description: Verifies a member can review a counterparty after completing a trade and the review is visible on the counterparty profile.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the marketplace
Open a listing from another user
Initiate a trade from the listing
Click the navigation link to trades
Open the newly created trade
Mark the trade as complete
Submit a review with a valid rating and a short text comment
Open the counterparty profile from the trade or review context
Verify the submitted review is displayed on the counterparty profile

title: Publish a new listing and see it in the marketplace
description: Verifies an authenticated member can create a listing and then find it in the marketplace after publishing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open create listing
Fill a unique title into the listing title field
Fill a description into the listing description field
Select a valid listing type
Select a valid experience level
Fill a valid credit price into the price field
Submit the listing form
Click the navigation item to open the marketplace
Use marketplace search to search for the unique listing title
Verify the newly created listing is displayed in marketplace results

title: Search listings by keyword
description: Verifies a logged-in user can search marketplace listings and sees results filtered to the entered query.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the marketplace
Fill a keyword into the marketplace search field
Verify listings are filtered to match the search query

title: Initiate a barter trade from a listing and see it in Trades
description: Verifies an authenticated member can initiate a barter trade from a listing and the barter trade appears in the trades list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open create listing
Fill a unique title into the listing title field
Fill a description into the listing description field
Select a valid listing type
Select a valid experience level
Fill a valid credit price into the price field
Submit the listing form
Click the navigation item to open the marketplace
Use marketplace search to search for the unique listing title
Open the listing details from the results
Choose the barter trade option
Confirm the trade terms
Click the navigation item to open trades
Verify the newly initiated barter trade is displayed in the trades list

title: Resolve a report in admin dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can open a report from the reports list, resolve it, and see its status updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the admin dashboard
View the reports list
Open a report from the list
Resolve the report
Verify the report status is updated to resolved

title: View credit balance and transaction history from the dashboard
description: Verifies a member can see their current credit balance and open a panel showing a list of credit transactions.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the dashboard
Open the transaction history panel
Verify the current credit balance is visible in the navbar
Verify a list of credit transactions is displayed

title: Filter listings by location and type and exclude own listings
description: Verifies a logged-in user can narrow results using location and type filters and does not see their own listings in results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the marketplace
Select a location filter
Select a listing type filter
Verify the displayed listings reflect the selected filters
Verify the user's own listings are not shown in the results

title: Publish a listing with a credit price that appears correctly in the marketplace
description: Verifies a member can create a listing with a credit price and the listing appears in the marketplace showing that same price.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to create a listing
Fill a unique listing title into the title field
Select a valid listing type
Select a valid experience level
Fill a valid credit price into the credit price field
Submit the listing form to publish
Click the navigation link to the marketplace
Verify the newly published listing is visible in the marketplace with a credit price shown

title: Edit and save profile name and location
description: Verifies a member can edit their name or location in profile and sees the updated details after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the profile area
Enter edit mode for profile details
Fill "Test User Renamed" into the name field
Fill "Test City" into the location field
Save profile changes
Verify the profile shows the updated name and location

title: See recommended listings in smart matching and initiate a trade from a recommendation
description: Verifies the smart matching section shows recommended listings and a member can select one to initiate a trade.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the marketplace
Scroll to the smart matching recommendations row
Select a recommended listing
Initiate a trade from the listing
Verify the trade initiation results in a visible trade confirmation state

title: Ban a user from the admin users directory
description: Verifies an admin can flag a user as banned and sees the user marked as banned in the directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the admin dashboard
Open the users directory
Open a user record from the directory
Flag the user as banned
Verify the user is shown as banned in the directory

title: Block a user and hide their listings in marketplace
description: Verifies blocking a user removes that user’s listings from the blocker’s marketplace results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the profile area
Open the block user flow
Select a user to block
Confirm the block action
Click the link to open the marketplace
Verify listings from the blocked user are not shown in the results

title: Switch conversations and see the chat thread update
description: Verifies an authenticated member can switch between conversations and the displayed messages update to the selected thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open messages
Select one conversation from the conversation list
Fill a unique message into the message composer field
Send the message
Select a different conversation from the conversation list
Verify the chat thread content changes to match the newly selected conversation

title: Report a listing from marketplace
description: Verifies a member can report a marketplace listing by providing a reason and sees a submission confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the marketplace
Select a listing from the results
Start the report flow for the listing
Select a valid report reason
Submit the report
Verify a report submission confirmation is visible

title: View notifications and deep-link to related item
description: Verifies a signed-in user can open the notifications panel from the dashboard and selecting a notification navigates to its related trade/message/profile view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the login entry point
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Open the notifications panel
Verify a list of recent notifications is displayed
Select a notification from the list
Verify the app navigates to the related item view

title: Opening notifications marks them as read and clears badge
description: Verifies that after opening the notifications panel and viewing notifications, the unread indicator is cleared on return to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the login entry point
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Open the notifications panel
Wait for the notifications list to finish loading
Close the notifications panel
Verify the unread notification badge is cleared

title: Non-admin cannot access admin dashboard
description: Verifies a non-admin member is prevented from viewing admin features when attempting to open the admin dashboard route via in-app navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the admin dashboard
Verify an unauthorized access message is visible

title: Profile changes persist after navigating away and back
description: Verifies saved profile updates remain visible after leaving the profile view and returning.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the profile area
Enter edit mode for profile details
Fill "Persistent Name" into the name field
Save profile changes
Click the link to open the dashboard
Click the link to open the profile area
Verify the profile shows the updated name

title: Blocking persists across marketplace refresh within the session
description: Verifies the marketplace continues to exclude a blocked user’s listings after reloading the marketplace view within the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the profile area
Open the block user flow
Select a user to block
Confirm the block action
Click the link to open the marketplace
Click the link to open the dashboard
Click the link to open the marketplace
Verify listings from the blocked user are not shown in the results

title: Prevent submitting a review for an in-progress trade
description: Verifies attempting to submit a review on an in-progress trade is blocked with a visible validation error and no review is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the marketplace
Open a listing from another user
Initiate a trade from the listing
Click the navigation link to trades
Open the newly created trade
Attempt to submit a review with a valid rating and a short text comment
Verify a review eligibility validation error is visible

title: Block login with incorrect password
description: Verifies login fails with incorrect credentials and an invalid-credentials error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Admin reports list supports opening multiple reports sequentially
description: Verifies an admin can open a report, return to the reports list, and open another report without the UI breaking.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the admin dashboard
View the reports list
Open a report from the list
Return to the reports list
Open a different report from the list
Verify the second report details are displayed

title: Notifications panel supports empty state
description: Verifies that when there are no notifications, opening the notifications panel shows an empty state instead of a broken or blank UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the login entry point
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Open the notifications panel
Verify an empty state is visible for notifications

title: Reject invalid email during signup
description: Verifies signup blocks progress when an invalid email format is entered and shows an inline email validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the signup flow
Fill in the email field with invalid-email-format
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the signup form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Profile save validates required fields
description: Verifies the profile cannot be saved when required fields are cleared and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the profile area
Enter edit mode for profile details
Fill "" into the name field
Save profile changes
Verify a profile validation error is visible

title: Block publish when listing price exceeds the allowed cap
description: Verifies the create listing form prevents submission when the credit price is above the cap for the selected experience level.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open create listing
Fill a unique title into the listing title field
Fill a description into the listing description field
Select a valid listing type
Select an experience level with a known price cap option in the UI
Fill a credit price above the displayed/allowed cap into the price field
Submit the listing form
Verify a price validation error is visible and the listing is not published

title: Report flow requires a reason to submit
description: Verifies the report submission is prevented until a valid reason is selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the marketplace
Select a listing from the results
Start the report flow for the listing
Submit the report without selecting a reason
Verify a report validation error is visible

title: Notification badge is not shown when there are no unread notifications
description: Verifies that the notification badge does not appear or indicates zero when there are no unread notifications on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the login entry point
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Verify the notification badge is not shown or indicates no unread notifications

title: Cancel profile edits does not change saved details
description: Verifies canceling profile edits leaves the previously saved profile details unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the profile area
Capture the currently displayed profile name
Enter edit mode for profile details
Fill "Unsaved Name" into the name field
Cancel profile editing
Verify the profile does not show the unsaved name change

title: Notifications panel handles long list via scrolling
description: Verifies that a user can scroll within the notifications list and still select a notification to navigate correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the login entry point
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Open the notifications panel
Scroll within the notifications list to reveal older notifications
Select an older notification from the list
Verify the app navigates to the related item view

title: Toggle password visibility and still log in
description: Verifies the password visibility toggle changes the password field visibility and login still succeeds.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Toggle password visibility
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Cancel report leaves listing unchanged
description: Verifies canceling the report flow returns the user to the listing without submitting a report.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the marketplace
Select a listing from the results
Start the report flow for the listing
Cancel the report flow
Verify the listing details view remains available
